api_endpoint.title: API Endpoint
api_endpoint.description: The URL of the OpenAI-compatible API (e.g., https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions).

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your API secret key for the provider.

model.title: Model
model.description: The specific AI model to use (e.g., gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo).

target_field.title: Target Word Field
target_field.description: The name of the field containing the word you are learning (e.g., 'Word' or 'Expression').

prompt_template.title: Prompt Template
prompt_template.description: Use {Target}, {Generated Sentence}, and {Generated Translation} as placeholders. Ensure the prompt asks for i+1 logic.

report_errors.title: Report Errors
report_errors.description: If enabled, the extension will show a popup notification if a background generation fails.
